name: Botamon
description: A freshly born Digimon covered in black fur.

name: Koromon
description: Agumon's In-Training form. A small pink blob with a big mouth.

name: Tsunomon
description: Gabumon's In-Training form with a small horn.

name: Nyaromon
description: Gatomon's In-Training form. A small fox-like Digimon.

name: Tanemon
description: Palmon's In-Training form. A small seed Digimon.

name: Motimon
description: Tentomon's In-Training form. A soft, blob-like Digimon.

name: Tokomon
description: Patamon's In-Training form. A small fluffy Digimon with tiny feet.

name: Yokomon
description: Biyomon's In-Training form. A pink flower-shaped Digimon.

name: Poyomon
description: Gomamon's In-Training form. A translucent water-type Digimon.

name: Punimon
description: A soft, bouncy Digimon that is Tsunomon's Fresh form.

name: Pabumon
description: Motimon's Fresh form. A bubble-like Digimon.

name: Pichimon
description: Gomamon's Fresh form. A tiny water Digimon.

name: Yuramon
description: Palmon's Fresh form. A tiny seed that floats on the wind.

name: Dorimon
description: Dorumon's Fresh form. A small dragon-type baby Digimon.

name: Fufumon
description: Veemon's Fresh form. A tiny dragon-like Digimon.

name: Puwamon
description: Falcomon's Fresh form. A tiny feathered Digimon.

name: Jyarimon
description: Guilmon's Fresh form. A small fiery baby Digimon.

name: Keemon
description: Wormmon's Fresh form. A tiny worm-like Digimon.

name: Moonmon
description: DemiDevimon's Fresh form. A small moon-shaped Digimon.

name: Conomon
description: An alternative Fresh form that can digivolve into Agumon.

name: Agumon
description: A small orange dinosaur Digimon. The most iconic Digimon of all.

name: Gabumon
description: A reptile Digimon wearing Garurumon's fur pelt.

name: Patamon
description: A small Digimon with large ear-wings that can fly.

name: Palmon
description: A plant Digimon with a flower for a head and thorn-covered arms.

name: Tentomon
description: An insect Digimon with a hard carapace and electric powers.

name: Gomamon
description: A sea animal Digimon with red spiky fur and a white body.

name: Biyomon
description: A pink bird Digimon that wears a metal bracelet on its leg.

name: Gatomon
description: A cat Digimon with clawed white gloves and a holy attribute.

name: Veemon
description: A cheerful dragon Digimon with a V-shaped crest on its forehead.

name: Wormmon
description: A gentle worm Digimon who is loyal to his partner.

name: Hawkmon
description: A hawk Digimon that wears a red helmet and carries a fan.

name: Armadillomon
description: A tough armadillo Digimon with a hard protective shell.

name: Guilmon
description: A dinosaur Digimon with a triangular hazard symbol on its chest.

name: Renamon
description: A tall fox Digimon with yellow fur and cool, reserved attitude.

name: Terriermon
description: A small rabbit-like Digimon with a single horn and a big appetite.

name: Lopmon
description: A small rabbit Digimon with three horns and dark powers.

name: Impmon
description: A mischievous imp Digimon with a childlike but sinister nature.

name: Leomon
description: A brave lion warrior Digimon known as the Beast King.

name: Kunemon
description: A caterpillar Digimon with a lightning bolt pattern on its body.

name: Betamon
description: An amphibian Digimon with a fin on its head and electric powers.

name: Elecmon
description: A nine-tailed fox Digimon crackling with electric energy.

name: Floramon
description: A flower Digimon with petal skirts and vine arms.

name: Candlemon
description: A Digimon that looks like a candle with a flame for a head.

name: DemiDevimon
description: A small winged demon Digimon that serves as Devimon's spy.

name: Salamon
description: A holy puppy Digimon with floppy ears and a gentle heart.

name: Penguinmon
description: An ice-type penguin Digimon that slides across frozen terrain.

name: Kamemon
description: A turtle Digimon wearing a manhole cover as a shell.

name: Falcomon
description: A ninja-like bird Digimon with razor-sharp wings.

name: Gaomon
description: A wolf Digimon that wears red boxing bandages and fights with skill.

name: Lalamon
description: A seed Digimon with a flower face who sings to cause confusion.

name: Flamemon
description: A fierce flame-type Digimon with a burning spirit.

name: ToyAgumon
description: A toy block-shaped version of Agumon made of plastic bricks.

name: AgumonBlack
description: A black-colored Agumon corrupted by dark data.

name: Kudamon
description: A holy dragon Digimon that wraps around a cartridge on its ear.

name: Bearmon
description: A bear cub Digimon wearing boxing gloves on its paws.

name: Dracmon
description: A dark dragon Digimon that feeds on the fear of others.

name: Dorumon
description: A dragon Digimon that carries the X-Antibody within its data.

name: Ryudamon
description: An armored dragon Digimon that uses steel techniques.

name: Monodramon
description: A small horned dragon Digimon with a curious and adventurous personality.

name: Keramon
description: A creepy viral Digimon born from corrupted network data.

name: Greymon
description: A giant dinosaur Digimon with a metal helmet and firepower rivaling a volcano.

name: Garurumon
description: A large wolf Digimon with ice-blue fur and freezing breath.

name: Angemon
description: An angel Digimon with six white wings and a staff of holy power.

name: Togemon
description: A giant cactus Digimon with boxing gloves and needle attacks.

name: Kabuterimon
description: A massive beetle Digimon with electric powers and a tough exoskeleton.

name: Ikkakumon
description: A walrus Digimon with a single horn that fires harpoon torpedoes.

name: Birdramon
description: A giant phoenix Digimon that soars through the sky wreathed in flames.

name: Leomon
description: The King of Beasts. A noble lion warrior who fights for justice.

name: Meramon
description: A Digimon composed entirely of living flame. Its body burns at extreme temperatures.

name: Airdramon
description: A serpentine dragon Digimon with large wings that flies through digital skies.

name: Devimon
description: A fallen angel Digimon who commands dark energy and corrupts others.

name: Ogremon
description: An ogre Digimon that carries a giant bone club and loves to fight.

name: Centarumon
description: A centaur Digimon with a cannon for a right arm and strong legs.

name: Frigimon
description: A snowman Digimon who appears friendly but is actually quite cold-hearted.

name: Mojyamon
description: A yeti-like Digimon that lives in icy mountains and punches with frozen fists.

name: Unimon
description: A flying unicorn Digimon with a holy attribute and radiant mane.

name: Numemon
description: A slug-like Digimon that throws its excrement as an attack. Weak but resilient.

name: Monzaemon
description: A giant stuffed bear Digimon that is actually terrifying in battle.

name: Drimogemon
description: A mole Digimon with a giant drill for a nose that bores through rock.

name: Shellmon
description: A shellfish Digimon with a hard shell and powerful water jets.

name: Cockatrimon
description: A giant rooster Digimon whose gaze can turn others to stone.

name: Seadramon
description: A sea serpent Digimon covered in icy blue scales.

name: Kuwagamon
description: A giant stag beetle Digimon with enormous pincers that can cut through anything.

name: Tyrannomon
description: A T-Rex Digimon with fiery breath and tremendous physical strength.

name: Monochromon
description: A ceratopsian Digimon with a thick hide of dragon-type armor.

name: Coelamon
description: An ancient fish Digimon unchanged since prehistoric times.

name: Flymon
description: A giant hornet Digimon with toxic stingers and rapid wings.

name: Gesomon
description: A squid Digimon that sprays toxic ink and lurks in deep digital seas.

name: Gizamon
description: An aquatic Digimon with webbed feet and sharp fin spines.

name: Nanimon
description: A bald, muscular Digimon that talks tough and punches harder.

name: Sukamon
description: A disgusting yellow Digimon made of slime. Nobody likes to fight one.

name: Vademon
description: An alien Digimon who abducts others and steals their spirits.

name: Veedramon
description: A pure blue dragon Digimon with immense power in its V-fins.

name: Thunderbirmon
description: A thunderbird Digimon that calls down lightning from storm clouds.

name: Snimon
description: A giant mantis Digimon with razor-edged scythe arms that strike at blinding speed.

name: Devidramon
description: A huge dark dragon Digimon with glowing red eyes and massive claws.

name: Kyubimon
description: A nine-tailed fox Digimon wreathed in foxfire that attacks with spirit flames.

name: Gargomon
description: A rabbit Digimon with Gatling guns for arms that fires a relentless barrage.

name: Crescemon
description: A crescent moon-shaped Digimon that controls ice and darkness.

name: Wendigomon
description: A dark wendigo Digimon with giant fists and ice-cold rage.

name: ExVeemon
description: Veemon's champion form with an X-shaped beam weapon in its chest.

name: Stingmon
description: A knight-like insect Digimon that fights with a spike on its arm.

name: Aquilamon
description: A large eagle Digimon with powerful wings that generate red rings of energy.

name: Ankylomon
description: An ankylosaur Digimon with a club tail and impenetrable armor plates.

name: Guardromon
description: A robot Digimon with rocket arms and steel armor that acts as a guardian.

name: Clockmon
description: A mechanical Digimon that controls time and space with its clock body.

name: Hookmon
description: A pirate Digimon with a hook hand and a cannon that blasts through defenses.

name: Hagurumon
description: A gear Digimon whose whole body is a cog mechanism.

name: Woodmon
description: A tree Digimon that attacks with whipping branches and can camouflage.

name: Kiwimon
description: A plant-type bird Digimon that runs faster than it flies.

name: MetalGreymon
description: Greymon's evolved form with a cybernetic arm and devastating Giga Blaster attack.

name: WereGarurumon
description: Garurumon's biped wolf warrior form with deadly ice and martial arts attacks.

name: MagnaAngemon
description: An eight-winged angel Digimon that opens the Gate of Destiny to purge evil.

name: Lillymon
description: A fairy Digimon who wields flowers as weapons with elegance and grace.

name: MegaKabuterimon
description: A giant red stag beetle Digimon with overwhelming electric attacks.

name: Zudomon
description: A walrus warrior Digimon with a magical hammer that strikes like a thunderbolt.

name: Garudamon
description: A giant bird warrior Digimon with burning wings and tremendous speed.

name: Angewomon
description: A female angel Digimon with eight wings whose arrows pierce the darkness.

name: SkullGreymon
description: Greymon corrupted by darkness. Its power is overwhelming but uncontrollable.

name: LadyDevimon
description: An evil female angel Digimon whose dark powers corrupt everything around her.

name: Andromon
description: A cyborg Digimon with perfect mechanical body and absolute loyalty to justice.

name: Mamemon
description: A small but powerful Digimon that attacks with explosive smile bombs.

name: MetalMamemon
description: Mamemon's metallic form with even stronger smile-powered explosions.

name: BigMamemon
description: A giant version of Mamemon that can roll through enemies with ease.

name: Gigadramon
description: A mechanical dragon Digimon enhanced with virus-type dark data.

name: Megadramon
description: A dark mechanical dragon that soars through the digital sky spreading destruction.

name: Piximon
description: A tiny pixie Digimon with enormous holy power packed into a small body.

name: Etemon
description: An Elvis-styled monkey Digimon who uses a Dark Network to corrupt others.

name: Myotismon
description: A vampire Digimon that commands bats and thrives on fear.

name: Phoenixmon
description: The legendary phoenix. Its flames of rebirth can revive it from any defeat.

name: Digitamamon
description: A giant egg Digimon whose shell can withstand almost any attack.

name: WaruMonzaemon
description: The evil version of Monzaemon, filled with malicious dark energy.

name: Pumpkinmon
description: A pumpkin-headed Digimon that appears during dark seasons to haunt enemies.

name: Meteormon
description: A rocky Digimon born from a meteorite that crashes through any defense.

name: Scorpiomon
description: A giant scorpion Digimon with devastating poison-tipped claws and tail.

name: Anomalocarimon
description: An ancient anomalocaris Digimon unchanged since the dawn of the Digital World.

name: Garbagemon
description: A trash can Digimon that attacks by hurling toxic garbage at enemies.

name: Matadormon
description: A dark matador Digimon that dances through battle with deadly precision.

name: Kimeramon
description: A chimera Digimon assembled from parts of many powerful Digimon.

name: Infermon
description: A viral spider Digimon that spreads through networks corrupting everything.

name: Taomon
description: A fox shaman Digimon that uses Taoist techniques and sacred brushwork.

name: Rapidmon
description: Gargomon's ultimate form — a rapid-fire mech suit with incredible speed.

name: Antylamon
description: The rabbit Deva Digimon whose blade-like ears can cut through anything.

name: Pajiramon
description: The sheep Deva serving the Sovereign Azulongmon.

name: Vajramon
description: The ox Deva that fights for Azulongmon with devastating strength.

name: Indramon
description: The horse Deva armed with a divine trumpet that unleashes sonic devastation.

name: Chatsuramon
description: The dog Deva that serves the dark will of Cherubimon.

name: Mihiramon
description: The tiger Deva that strikes with lightning-fast claws.

name: Sandiramon
description: The snake Deva that burrows underground and attacks with poison.

name: Vikaralamon
description: The boar Deva — enormous and unstoppable once it starts charging.

name: Kumbhiramon
description: The rat Deva that commands armies of smaller Digimon.

name: Makuramon
description: The monkey Deva that moves swiftly and steals DigiEggs.

name: Majiramon
description: The dragon Deva — the most powerful of the Devas besides Vikaralamon.

name: IceDevimon
description: A demonic ice Digimon that freezes its victims before devouring them.

name: SkullMeramon
description: A skeletal fire Digimon whose flames burn even in digital rain.

name: MarineDevimon
description: A dark sea monster Digimon that lurks in the deepest digital oceans.

name: NeoMyotismon
description: An evolved Myotismon with even greater dark powers and cruel cunning.

name: Beastmon
description: A fierce beast warrior Digimon with pride and strength beyond compare.

name: Okuwamon
description: A giant stag beetle Ultimate whose jaws can crush any armor.

name: GranKuwagamon
description: The most powerful beetle Digimon whose sheer strength topples mountains.

name: WarGreymon
description: The ultimate dragon warrior. Its Chrome Digizoid armor is impenetrable.

name: MetalGarurumon
description: A cybernetic wolf Digimon packed with missiles and laser cannons.

name: Seraphimon
description: The highest angel. Its Ten Commandments seal away all evil.

name: Rosemon
description: The queen of flowers. Her thorned whip Thorn Whip can pierce any armor.

name: HerculesKabuterimon
description: The most powerful insect Digimon. Its electricity can power a city.

name: Plesiomon
description: A sea serpent Mega Digimon that commands the depths of the digital sea.

name: Phoenixmon
description: The immortal phoenix reborn from flames. Its cry can shatter mountains.

name: Magnadramon
description: The holy dragon that guards the Digital World's future with divine power.

name: Omnimon
description: The DNA Digivolution of WarGreymon and MetalGarurumon. Absolute power.

name: Gallantmon
description: The Royal Knight armed with a holy lance and shield. Champion of justice.

name: MegaGargomon
description: A mech-suit Digimon with countless missiles and the heart of a warrior.

name: Sakuyamon
description: A shrine maiden Digimon that wields sacred fox magic with grace.

name: KerpymonGood
description: The good Kerpymon, a Celestial Digimon who protects all living Digimon.

name: ImperialDramonDM
description: Imperialdramon in Dragon Mode — an ancient dragon of immense destructive power.

name: ImperialDramonFM
description: Imperialdramon in Fighter Mode — a holy dragon knight of unlimited power.

name: Beelzemon
description: The Three Great Demon Lords' fastest. Rides a motorcycle and wields twin guns.

name: Diaboromon
description: The virus that invaded the internet. Diaboromon can copy itself infinitely.

name: Armageddemon
description: The ultimate form of Diaboromon — an apocalyptic beast of pure destruction.

name: Daemon
description: A Great Demon Lord sealed away for his evil power. Pure dark energy.

name: VenomMyotismon
description: Myotismon's ultimate form — a venom-dripping beast that devours everything.

name: Piedmon
description: The Dark Master who rules as a clown-jester. His Trump Sword is unavoidable.

name: Machinedramon
description: The Dark Master made entirely of steel. The most powerful machine Digimon.

name: MetalSeadramon
description: The Dark Master of the seas with a metallic body and an Ultimate Stream.

name: Puppetmon
description: A wooden puppet Dark Master who controls others like marionettes.

name: Apocalymon
description: The embodiment of all deleted Digimon. Its power destroys the Digital World.

name: ShineGreymon
description: A holy fire dragon warrior clad in radiant golden armor.

name: MirageGaogamon
description: A wolf warrior Mega clad in blue armor who leaves mirages when moving at speed.

name: RosemonBM
description: Rosemon's Burst Mode — the queen of flowers in full bloom with dark power unleashed.

name: Ravemon
description: A black raven Mega Digimon of incredible speed and dark cutting power.

name: Susanoomon
description: The god of storms wielding sacred sword and lightning, born from ten warriors.

name: MaloMyotismon
description: Myotismon's true Mega form — darkness incarnate that feeds on despair.

name: MarineAngemon
description: A tiny pink angel fish Digimon whose Ocean Love heals everything.

name: Baihumon
description: The White Tiger Sovereign who guards the west with icy steel power.

name: Zhuqiaomon
description: The Vermilion Bird Sovereign of the south. A divine phoenix of holy fire.

name: Ebonwumon
description: The Black Tortoise Sovereign of the north who controls water and darkness.

name: Azulongmon
description: The Azure Dragon Sovereign of the east. Commands lightning and ten Devas.

name: Xuanwumon
description: The Guardian Sovereign of the hidden north, master of ice and holy balance.

name: Fanglongmon
description: The golden dragon at the center of all four Sovereigns. The axis of the Digital World.

name: ImperialDramonPM
description: Imperialdramon Paladin Mode — the ultimate holy knight with the Omega Blade.

name: GallantmonCM
description: Gallantmon Crimson Mode — Gallantmon at full power, blazing with crimson holy fire.
